scopeNote: Sprint 3 is a focused bug fix: select_past_note must emit editing_session_state_changed so EditorPane receives past note body on row click. Review only the Sprint 3 additions (REQ-FEED-024, PROP-FEED-S2-008, §12). The rest of the spec (REQ-FEED-001..023) has already passed Phase 1c in Sprint 1 and Sprint 2.
